overall.description: A small wooden sailboat navigates dark waters at night along a snow-covered mountainous coastline in a fantasy game setting. Light snowfall and glowing bioluminescent particles fill the air as the boat sails smoothly through the water, leaving a shimmering wake trail while the camera follows from behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: open water channel approaching snow-covered mountains

agents.ego_description: piloting the sailboat through open water along the mountainous coastline, steering toward the narrow passage ahead

entered.detail: large snow-covered mountain peaks with rocky outcrops rising in the background
steep rocky cliffside with patches of snow along the water's edge
bioluminescent white particles floating in the air and reflecting on the water surface
dark cloudy night sky with subtle blue-green ambient lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide expanse of dark water at night, with the sailboat moving smoothly toward a massive snow-capped mountain range on the left. Glowing particles drift through the air, illuminating the boat's wake, while rocky cliffs line the port side.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow water passage between tall rocky cliffs

events.description: boat enters narrow channel with rocky cliffs rising on both sides, enclosing the space
density of glowing particles decreases as boat approaches exit of narrow passage

agents.ego_description: carefully navigating the sailboat through the confined waterway between steep rock walls

entered.detail: tall dark rocky cliffs appearing on the starboard side, creating a narrow canyon effect

segments.scene_description: The boat enters a narrow, enclosed water passage flanked by steep rocky cliffs on both sides. The space feels confined compared to the open water, with the cliff faces looming closer and the glowing particle effects becoming denser and more prominent in the air.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal waters with forested mountain shoreline

events.description: camera smoothly transitions from rear view to side profile view of the sailboat

agents.ego_description: continuing to sail along the coast as the camera circles to reveal the side of the boat and the detailed shoreline

entered.detail: snow-dusted evergreen trees visible on the lower mountain slopes along the water

segments.scene_description: Exiting the narrow passage, the boat returns to more open waters with expansive views of the snow-covered coastline. The camera gradually shifts to a side view, revealing the full profile of the sailboat against the backdrop of forested mountain slopes, while the glowing particle effects thin out.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a sailboat travels from a wide nocturnal expanse through a restrictive canyon and back into an open coastal vista. It begins on a broad stretch of dark water, gliding toward massive snow-capped mountains while glowing particles illuminate the boat's shimmering wake. As the vessel advances, the environment tightens into a narrow water passage where steep rocky cliffs loom closely on both sides and the bioluminescent air becomes denser. The scene then expands as the boat exits the gorge, returning to the open sea with wide views of the snow-covered coastline. Finally, the camera shifts to a side profile of the sailboat, framing it against forested mountain slopes as the glowing particles gradually thin out.
